resources.string: Run a local ProxyT instance on Android and advertise it over the phone’s private hotspot IP.
Optional. Leave blank to build a local hotspot/LAN URL from the selected private IP.
Detected local IP for generated URL
Used only when Advertised base URL is blank.
Point the iPhone Tailscale client at the advertised URL shown above. For hotspot-only use, this should usually be an RFC1918 address like http://192.168.43.1:8080.
No private hotspot/LAN IPv4 address detected yet. You can still enter the advertised URL manually.
Notification permission required before starting the proxy
This app depends on foreground-service notifications. Grant notification permission on Android 13 or newer before starting the proxy.
Notification permission was denied. Open app settings, allow notifications, and then try starting the proxy again.
